introSection: Family Thriller (Simplified Chinese: 家庭过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Sunac Land Chengdu in Dujiangyan, Chengdu, Sichuan, China. It opened with the park on 19 September 2020.
fullText: Family Thriller (Simplified Chinese: 家庭过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Sunac Land Chengdu in Dujiangyan, Chengdu, Sichuan, China. It opened with the park on 19 September 2020.
